title: justicia latior subsp. longifolia
intro: Justicia latior subsp. longifolia, also known as the long-leaved Justicia, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The long-leaved Justicia has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimalarial properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia latior subsp. longifolia include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicine, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
